scenario_label: Compound disaster: flash flood triggers transformer fires in industrial zone, 60-minute window
context_note: Heavy rain overwhelms industrial-zone drainage, water reaches transformers and short-circuits them. Cascade: floodwater + electrical fires + ignited petroleum spill from a nearby workshop. 8 reports across a 300m radius. The key synthesis challenge: different responders classify the primary disaster differently (fire, flood, building collapse). The model must produce a coherent compound classification and resolve which lane (water rescue, fire suppression, electrical isolation) is most urgent. Conflicting severity reports from overlapping vantage points test the duplicate / conflict resolution path.

reports.severity_rationale: Visible flames from electrical transformer; thick black smoke; flames spreading to adjacent wooden lean-to; ground around transformer also flooded ankle-deep.
reports.immediate_action: Evacuate 50m radius; request electrical utility immediate isolation; do NOT use water on electrical fire; deploy CO2 or dry chemical only.
reports.routing_rationale: Compound hazard: fire + flood + live electrical. Severity 4.

location.label: Jl. Industri III, 40m west of transformer 4B

reports.severity_rationale: Same street as report c3f0e4d6-0001 but from a different angle: floodwater knee-deep and rising, partially visible smoke in background suggesting upstream fire.
reports.immediate_action: Move family away from waterfront toward higher ground east; warn of upstream fire and electrical risk in floodwater; do not wade further.
reports.routing_rationale: Apparent conflict with prior report classification; same area, different primary hazard observed.

location.label: Pak Hadi welding workshop, Jl. Industri III no 17

reports.severity_rationale: Welding workshop fire spreading rapidly; petroleum storage drum visibly leaking burning liquid into floodwater (which now carries flame); one worker visible inside trying to fight fire.
reports.immediate_action: URGENT extraction of worker; foam suppressant only (no water); evacuate 100m downwind; isolate fuel storage upstream if possible without exposure.
reports.routing_rationale: Severity 5; trapped worker with compound fuel/water/fire propagation.

reports.severity_rationale: Image partially obscured by smoke and rain; appears to show the wooden lean-to next to transformer has collapsed; uncertain if anyone was inside; flames diminishing in this frame.
reports.immediate_action: Wait for smoke to clear before approach; thermal-imaging needed to check for occupants under collapsed structure; do not commit personnel until utility confirms electrical isolation.
reports.routing_rationale: Low classification confidence (0.58); image quality poor; needs synthesis to resolve.

location.label: Jl. Industri III intersection with Jl. Pemuda

reports.severity_rationale: Major intersection waist-deep in fast-moving water with floating debris (including burning material from upstream); ambulance stuck in water, two paramedics on its roof signaling for help.
reports.immediate_action: Deploy boat or rope-rescue to recover paramedics; reroute medical traffic via Jl. Pemuda alternate; warn approaching responders of burning debris in water.
reports.routing_rationale: Critical: medical responders themselves trapped; compound fire+water hazard.

location.label: Pak Hadi welding workshop, Jl. Industri III no 17 (rear)

reports.severity_rationale: Follow-up at welding workshop: drum has ruptured; full structure fire; worker extracted by colleagues (visible being carried out, burns to arms); fire now spreading to next unit east.
reports.immediate_action: Burn casualty to medical immediately; continue foam suppression on workshop; preemptive evacuation of next two units east; isolate fuel supply.
reports.routing_rationale: Severity 5; casualty extracted; fire spreading; continued mass-evac risk.

location.label: Rooftop of warehouse facing Jl. Industri III

reports.severity_rationale: Aerial view from rooftop: about 12 workers gathered on warehouse roof; floodwater below them carries occasional flame; one elderly worker sitting and visibly distressed; group otherwise stable.
reports.immediate_action: Confirm group is safe in place; plan boat or aerial extraction; deliver supplies (water, rain tarp) by drone if available; reassure via loud-hailer.
reports.routing_rationale: Stranded group with elderly member; compound water/fire hazard prevents normal extraction.

reports.severity_rationale: Alternate route Jl. Pemuda: shin-deep water on this side, traffic still moving slowly; one boat-rescue team launching from this point toward intersection.
reports.immediate_action: Keep Jl. Pemuda clear for emergency traffic; mark boat-launch point with cones; coordinate launch with report c3f0e4d6-0005 (ambulance rescue).
reports.routing_rationale: Critical alternate route status; boat rescue staging.
